item.title: Apple iPhone 18 Pro May See Record-Breaking Power Upgrade, Report Says
item.description: A new report says the next flagship iPhone could have an improvement to the feature users love: battery life.

item.title: ‘Paradise’ Season 2’s Rotten Tomatoes Score Solidifies As Reviews Pour In
item.description: Hulu's Paradise season 2 now has a Rotten Tomatoes score, and it may indicate whether or not you should watch it this week.

item.title: ‘A Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms’ And ‘Breaking Bad’s IMDB Score War Is Escalating
item.description: Breaking Bad and A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms fans are blasting each other with one stars reviews on IMDB. Why?

item.title: Why Some Xbox Fans Are Worried About New Microsoft Gaming CEO, Asha Sharma
item.description: Xbox has a new leader in the form of Microsoft Gaming CEO Asha Sharma, who comes from an AI position and has not worked in gaming before.

item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today: Sunday, February 22 Clues And Answers (#987)
item.description: Looking for today's NYT Connections hints? Some help and the answers for today's game are right here to help keep your streak alive.
